_comment: Prompts for Cloudflare Workers AI (Flux) photography. Each entry maps an output file to a prompt. Run scripts/generate-flux-images.mjs to render. Style is kept consistent: warm natural light, shallow depth of field, rustic St. Paul bakery, parchment + wood tones.
_style: professional food photography, warm natural window light, shallow depth of field, rustic wooden table, soft parchment background, appetizing, editorial, no text, no watermark

images.prompt: An abundant overhead spread of freshly baked Ethiopian breads on a warm wooden table — a golden cardamom himbasha scored in a sunburst, a honey-glazed dabo, a rolled stack of teff injera, a small bag of roasted coffee beans, scattered nigella seeds
A single round golden himbasha celebration bread scored in a sunburst pattern, lightly dusted with seeds, on parchment
A rustic round honey-spiced Ethiopian dabo loaf with a deep amber crust flecked with nigella seeds, on a wooden board
An oversized burnished Ethiopian difo dabo celebration loaf resting on a woven mesob basket
A rolled stack of soft spongy teff injera flatbread showing its lacy fermented surface, on a plate
A deep red-gold berbere ambasha bread torn open to reveal a soft spiced crumb, steam rising
A stack of four thin freckled Ethiopian kita flatbreads on parchment paper
Bright orange lattice-like mushabek sweet spirals glistening with saffron syrup on a small plate
A plate of deep-brown coffee and cardamom shortbread cookies beside scattered roasted coffee beans
A scattered pile of small golden toasted dabo kolo crunch nuggets in a paper bag
A kraft paper bag of whole roasted Yirgacheffe coffee beans spilling onto a wooden board
A linen-lined box filled with assorted Ethiopian breads and a sweet, ready for delivery
A small linen-lined box holding two Ethiopian breads and a wrapped sweet on a warm cloth
An abundant monthly gift box with a large feast loaf, several breads, a sweet, and a bag of coffee
A home kitchen scene with hands flouring dough on a wooden counter, morning light through a window
Close-up of teff injera batter fermenting in a ceramic bowl beside cardamom pods and a small sack of teff flour
A warm community table with shared Ethiopian bread being passed between hands, candid and inviting
